initiatives.name: Monkeywrench Books
initiatives.description: A volunteer-run radical bookstore and community space providing access to literature, zines, and organizing resources. Through their bookstore, events, and community programs, they foster mutual aid networks and create spaces for education, organizing, and building solidarity in Austin.

initiatives.name: Austin Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: Community-based network providing food, water, and essential supplies to those in need.

initiatives.name: ATX Free Fridge Project
initiatives.description: Network of community fridges providing free food access across Austin.

initiatives.name: Inside Books Project
initiatives.description: Volunteer organization sending free books and educational materials to people incarcerated in Texas prisons.

initiatives.name: Austin Liberation
initiatives.description: A youth-led grassroots organization dedicated to implementing revolutionary change within Austin, TX.

initiatives.name: Stop the Displacement ATX
initiatives.description: Fighting gentrification and displacement through direct action and mutual aid.

initiatives.name: Casa Marianella
initiatives.description: Shelter and support services for displaced immigrants. Also has a hosting program where residents can stay with members of the community.

initiatives.name: Austin Mutual Aid Collective
initiatives.description: Coordinating mutual aid efforts and resource distribution across Austin.

initiatives.name: NICE Project
initiatives.description: Free 24/7 Naloxone vending machines.

initiatives.description: Support for Unhoused LGBTQ+ in ATX, Black, Indigenous, trans, elders, swers

initiatives.name: Bat City Anarchist Organization
initiatives.description: Collection of anarchists out of so called "Austin, TX"

initiatives.name: Street Forum Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: Mutual aid centering unhoused Austinites since 2019 | Weekly distro downtown

initiatives.name: Community Powered ATX
initiatives.description: Community Powered ATX is a collective of young Black, Indigenous, People of Color organizers, East Austin community members, and allies working to build people power to fight for housing and social-environmental justice.

initiatives.name: Austin Brown Berets
initiatives.description: Indigenous Chicanxs here to Serve, Observe and Protect our Community

initiatives.name: Austin Against Apartheid
initiatives.description: Austin Against Apartheid unites businesses and customers in a boycott campaign calling for freedom, justice, and equality for the Palestinian people.

initiatives.name: Austin Bicycle Meals
initiatives.description: Serving meals & kindness to the Austin community!

initiatives.name: Bat City Jail Support Collective
initiatives.description: Systematizing and strengthening jail support and release processes in Travis County.

initiatives.name: Austin Action Medical
initiatives.description: A principled street medic collective formed to build community through medical skill/sharing and action support in Austin, TX

initiatives.name: Texas Harm Reduction Alliance
initiatives.description: Overdose prevention and harm reduction services in ATX & statewide advocacy for policies that promote the rights & dignity of people who use drugs.

initiatives.name: In Sight, In Mind (ISIM)
initiatives.description: Artists for collective liberation

initiatives.name: Primrose Community Care
initiatives.description: Mutual aid, harm reduction supplies and training

initiatives.name: Sex Workers Educating & Empowering Texans (SWEET)
initiatives.description: We are dedicated to ending the stigma against and criminalization of sex work through peer support, outreach, public education, and harm reduction.

initiatives.name: Austin Justice Coalition
initiatives.description: AJC serves people who are historically and systematically impacted by gentrification, segregation, over policing, a lack of educational and employment opportunities, and other institutional forms of racism in Austin.

initiatives.name: Texas Trans Futures
initiatives.description: trans youth freedom school in central tx, hosting free workshops for trans middle and high schoolers

initiatives.description: The Austin chapter of the Weelaunee Defense Society.

initiatives.description: Prison abolition, queer and trans prisoner support, political prisoner support, anti-repression.
